account_sid.description: Twilio account SID, used as the Basic auth username. Never logged.

auth_token.description: Twilio auth token, used as the Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: Twilio TaskRouter API base URL override for tests or proxies.

workspace_sid.description: TaskRouter workspace SID every stream is scoped to; substituted into each stream's workspace-scoped path.
